cortiloopUrl.label: CortiLoop API URL
cortiloopUrl.help: URL of the CortiLoop HTTP API server

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically store conversation content after each agent turn

recallTopK.help: Maximum number of memories to inject per recall

captureMaxChars.label: Capture Max Chars
captureMaxChars.help: Maximum message length eligible for auto-capture
